model_specification_line: result = smf.wls("full_time ~ DACA_eligible + birthyr_centered + I(birthyr_centered ** 2) + C(year) + C(statefip) + UNEMP + LFPR + DRIVERSLICENSES + INSTATETUITION + STATEFINANCIALAID + HIGHEREDBAN + EVERIFY + LIMITEVERIFY + OMNIBUS + TASK287G + JAIL287G", data=df, weights=df["perwt"]).fit(cov_type="HC1")
sample_selection: yrimmig > 0 and yrimmig <= 2007 and yrimmig <= birthyr + 15
